metadata.description: Google Ads campaign management plugins by Treetank.

plugins.description: Google Ads campaign management MCP server with two-phase safety confirmations: build complete Search/Display/Performance Max campaigns, manage keywords, ads, budgets, targeting, ad schedules, conversion goals and assets, plus read-only account analysis (hygiene report, budget scaling, search-terms waste, PMax breakdown). Every mutation requires explicit user approval.
plugins.name: google-ads-baby
